title: Kids Water Bottle With Straw, 600ml Children Drinks for School, Leakproof BPA-Free Tritan Motivational Drink Bottles for Girls Boys (Pink)
features: [Motivational Design with Time Markers]Featuring a sleek frosted translucent design, our water bottle helps you track your daily water intake with clear time markings and inspirational quotes. Perfect for maintaining hydration throughout your busy day - whether at the gym, yoga studio, office, or on outdoor adventures like hiking, cycling, and camping.

[Funny Drinking Games ]The water bottle features a fun growth-themed design where printed seedlings gradually "grow" as children drink more water - turning hydration into an engaging game that teaches kids "drinking water helps you grow big and strong!"Visually rewarding their progress and encouraging them to stay hydrated.

[BPA-Free & Premium Quality]Crafted from food-grade Tritan material, this 600ml sports bottle is completely BPA-free and safe for both kids and adults. Its thickened, anti-slip body provides extra durability and protection against drops and impacts.

[ 100% Leakproof Guarantee ]Enjoy worry-free hydration with our advanced leak-proof design. The secure lid features a durable silicone seal and safety lock , while the convenient wrist strap makes it easy to carry anywhere.

[ One-Handed Operation& Easy to Clean ]Designed for active lifestyles, simply press the button to open the lid with one hand. The soft silicone straw ensures comfortable, spill-proof drinking, and the lightweight 600ml capacity is ideal for on-the-go use.The wide mouth opening allows for easy filling with ice cubes or fruit infusions. Dishwasher safe, though hand washing is recommended for best results.
